'''''Pizzazz'' 6''' is the sixth issue in the [[Marvel Comics]] popular culture monthly magazine. This issue was cover-dated [[March]] [[1978]] and featured the continuation of the serialized ''[[Star Wars]]'' comic ''[[The Keeper's World]]''.<ref name="Issue 6" />

The issue also features a page of cartoons by Catherine Siracusa parodying then-current famous characters called "Easter with the Stars." It includes [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] wearing rabbit ears with text suggesting he will star in a science fiction version of ''Peter Cottontail'' titled ''Egg Wars''.<ref name="Issue 6" />
